tools.name: pubfi.capabilities.search
tools.description: Search PubFi's capability catalog for routeable crypto data needs without calling upstream providers or creating usage.

tools.name: pubfi.route.plan
tools.description: Create a dry-run PubFi route plan from intent and capability constraints without calling upstream providers or creating usage.

tools.name: pubfi.route.execute
tools.description: Execute a selected PubFi capability route using route-planning evidence, authenticated PubFi API-key attribution, and server-side providers.

tools.name: pubfi.route.explain
tools.description: Explain the routing decision PubFi would make for an intent, including reason codes and filters, without executing providers.

tools.name: pubfi.schema.get
tools.description: Return PubFi MCP input and output schema details for a named tool, especially pubfi.route.execute. This read-only helper is intended for agent setup and validation before planning or execution.
